title: Empty response from 'review the OpenAI Responses' in --continue session
description: gpt-5.3-codex via OpenAI Responses API returned empty/no response after 'review the OpenAI Responses we just committed'. Completed in 3s with 36.9k tokens but no visible output. May be a rendering issue (output not displayed) or API response parsing issue. Investigate: check if stream events were received, if text was extracted correctly, or if it's a TUI display bug.

logs.msg: No ion log file found — need to reproduce with ION_LOG=1. The session showed 'Completed (3s • 36.9k tokens)' which suggests the API call succeeded. Possible causes: (1) stream events were received but text wasn't rendered, (2) model returned only tool calls with no final text, (3) TUI rendering bug. Next: reproduce with ION_LOG=/tmp/ion.log and inspect stream events.
